englishDefinitions: A highly flammable petroleum-based substance used in incendiary bombs and flamethrowers, widely used in the Vietnam War.
To attack a place with napalm bombs.
examples: Napalm was used extensively during the Vietnam War and caused devastating burns.
The use of napalm in civilian areas was heavily criticized by human rights organizations.
Photographs from the Vietnam War showing the effects of napalm shocked the world.
